item.title: Scholastic Art and Writing Awards
item.description: Regional deadlines, projected across the December to January window. Eleven writing categories. Students in the US and Canada, grades 7 to 12, age 13 and over. Ten dollar per entry with waivers. Final work cannot be AI-generated. Confirm your region on the site. · Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: River of Words Poetry and Art Contest
item.description: Deadline approximate, projected from the late-February window; confirm with the organizer. Poetry and art on a watershed theme. Students worldwide, kindergarten to grade 12. Free. Confirm the date on the site. · Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Indigenous Arts and Stories
item.description: Program appears on hiatus, confirm with the organizer before relying on it. Historically a March 31 deadline. Creative writing and art. Canadians of Indigenous ancestry, ages 6 to 29. Free. · Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Italian Art Society session, CAA 2028
item.description: Session deadline projected from the annual April window. Italian art history. Italian Art Society at the CAA conference. Confirm on the site. · Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.description: International Commonwealth contest, Canadians eligible, 18 and under · Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: James Bartleman Indigenous Youth Creative Writing Award
item.description: Submission deadline, projected from the annual May window. Any creative writing. Indigenous students enrolled in and resident in Ontario, under 18. Free. Twenty-five hundred dollars to up to six recipients. Confirm on the site. · Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: USC Cinema and Media Studies Graduate Conference, Delirium
item.description: Deadline projected for the next annual cycle; confirm with the organizer. Media studies, graduate. University of Southern California. Graduate conference. Confirm on the site. · Unknown · unconfirmed · active
